name: Crab-Topped Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 ¼ oz Canned Crab Meat (drained and flaked)
recipeInstructions:
1. If frozen, thaw the large shrimp.
2. Shell fresh or thawed shrimp by opening each shell lengthwise down the body. Peel back the shell starting at the head end, gently pulling on the tail to remove it. Butterfly the shrimp and repeat with remaining pieces. Set aside.
3. In a small nonmetal bowl, microcook sliced green onion and butter or margarine uncovered for 1-1½ minutes until the onions are tender. Stir in lemon juice and bottled hot pepper sauce. Mix in flaked crab meat and bread crumbs.
4. Arrange shrimp cut-side up in a 10-inch oval casserole dish. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap.
5. Microcook, covered, for 45 seconds at 100% power, rotating the casserole half-turn once.
6. Drain any liquid that forms and rearrange shrimp so the least cooked portions are on the outside of the dish. Spoon the crab mixture over the shrimp.
7. Continue microcooking, covered, for another 1½ minutes at 100% power, rotating the casserole half-turn once until the shrimp are done and the crab mixture is heated through.
8. Serve with lemon wedges.
